reviews.body: Excellent service all round good experience

Newbury provided a self-build product and during the build and undervalued the build and refused to provide next tranche of cash so I had to take a personal loan to keep it going.  Every single estate agent, builder and local person knows that the land alone was worth more than the value they placed on the build, but thier surveyor was way off.  Even worse than this, on completion they again undervalued so I didnt have the required LTV. I had 4 independant valuations at £300k more than thier valuation.  They shouldnt offer self-build mortgages if they cannot work with clients.  Avoid - their in-house surveyor ruins everything with his stupid valuations and I has to pay £12k to get out of the product and find a decent lender - now have all the funds at 75% LTV because they use an independant surveyor report and the valuation is correct.  AVOID AT ALL COSTS
Good communication and guidance throughout the process.

Once again, Newbury use common sense when providing solutions to older clients, enabling them to use equity in their homes to help their families achieve their goals. Every member of staff from BDMs, whose knowledge and experience ensures all aspects of the case fits before submission, to processing team who are always happy to take a call and the Underwriters who you can speak to, makes the journey easy.  People dealing with people gives the client a good result.
Spoke to very helpful lady who answered all my queries on opening a new savings account.  Very thorough and polite.  Whole process from start to finish on opening an account was seamless.

I have used Newbury building society for many years. I took out my mortgage with them because at the time it was a really good deal at 0.2% above base rate, guaranteed for the duration. Never regretted it and it was paid off recently. Apart from this my wife and I have several investments each with the Newbury and have always found them very helpful with a good range of savings accounts.
Excellent personal service from an experienced counter assistant
Excellent experience. Lovely welcoming knowledgeable staff.
Very helpfull and knew what they where talking about
Our financial adviser recommended Newbury building society as the best one to suit our requirements. Response was excellent and prompt.

First class old fashioned customer service. Call the number get through to reception ask for the department you need and a human answers the phone, usually very quickly. Their mortgage advisors are amazing giving honest realistic advice and everything is done quickly. I can honestly say not only are they the best lender I have ever dealt with but they are the best company out of any I have dealt with for many years. I would 100% recommend them. Their mortgage products are also very competitive so its a win/win for customers!
